creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 181041
svn diff for x11-wm/icewm

I went to install this, and noticed it had no MAINTAINER.
So, since I use it, and also have some themes I've created
for it, that I want to add to the ports tree. I'd like to
maintain it.

Changes:
adds MAINTAINER
bumps PORTREVISION
and while here;
add TIMESTAMP

That's it!

patch (svn diff) included in this pr(1).

Thanks!

--Chris
